case_title: ALLIED TEMPORARIES INC VS COOK WALTER, ESQ. L O OFFICES OF JOSEPH O'SULLIVAN

docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF DENIED BY JUDGE DESMOND. HRG DATE 10/15/92 AT 9:00 AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLIED TEMPORARIES INC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COOK WALTER, ESQ. L O OFFICES OF JOSEPH O'SULLIVAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
